ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code representing the course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course category (foreign key to course_categories) */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the course is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of course IDs that are prerequisites for this course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed to enroll in the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., 100, 200, 300, 400) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department to which the course belongs (foreign key to departments) */,
  "contact_periods" INTEGER /* Total contact periods allocated for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES course_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course associated with the session (foreign key to courses) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., lecture, tutorial, practical) */,
  "session_day" TEXT /* Day of the session (e.g., Monday, Wednesday) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session is held */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who is teaching the session (foreign key to instructors) */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the session */,
  "session_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the session */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year during which the session is offered (foreign key to academic_years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sessions_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sessions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sessions_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" TEXT /* Year of enrollment */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student */,
  "semester_level" TEXT /* Current semester level of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic advisor assigned to the student (foreign key to instructors) */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the student's photo */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who is enrolled (foreign key to students) */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in (foreign key to courses) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "grade_status" TEXT /* Status of the grade (e.g., pending, final) */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year during which the student is enrolled in the course (foreign key to academic_years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the instructor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the instructor */,
  "academic_degree" TEXT /* Highest academic degree of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the instructor's photo */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Brief description of the instructor's research interests */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor was hired by the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor association */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being taught (foreign key to courses) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course (foreign key to instructors) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the course (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year during which the instructor is teaching the course (foreign key to academic_years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session attended (foreign key to course_sessions) */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student attending the session (foreign key to students) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Any remarks or notes about the attendance (e.g., late, early departure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES course_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment record associated with the grade (foreign key to enrollments) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the grade was earned */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., midterm, final) */,
  "weightage" INTEGER /* Weightage of the grade in the final course grade */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or feedback related to the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_instructor" INTEGER /* ID of the head instructor of the department (foreign key to instructors) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the department's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_instructor FOREIGN KEY ("head_instructor") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the resource is associated with (foreign key to courses) */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., textbook) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., book, article) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the resource if it is online */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the resource is required (1) or optional (0) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_start" TEXT /* Start year of the academic year */,
  "year_end" TEXT /* End year of the academic year */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the academic year */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the academic year (e.g., current, past, future) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor-student link */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being advised (foreign key to students) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor (instructor) assigned to the student (foreign key to instructors) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the advisor started advising the student */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the advisor stopped advising the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the advisor-student relationship (e.g., active, ended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the course category (e.g., PE, Core, Elective) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
